intended_use: INTContour provides a machine learning-based approach for automatic segmentation of structures including treatment targets and organs at risk to support the radiation therapy treatment planning proces
intended_use_full: INTContour provides a machine learning-based approach for automatic segmentation of structures including treatment targets and organs at risk to support the radiation therapy treatment planning process.
target_condition: Cancer requiring radiation therapy treatment planning
ground_truth: Ground truth performed by at least two trained personnel including dosimetrist, medical physicist, and/or radiation oncologist
other_metrics: Dice metric and 95% Hausdorff Distance (HD95); all organs demonstrated non-inferiority against predicate/reference device based on these metrics
